docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY EARLE, JOHN F AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EARLE, JOHN F ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED APR-21-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED APR-20-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EARLE, JOHN F IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THE TRUTH OF HIS CLAIM. THE DEFENDANT DISPUTED PLAINTIFFS CLAIM WITH SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROMINA ORBELLO (REGIONAL MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF JOHN F EARLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS ROMINA ORBELLO. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
